docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHNSON, LAZANIUS ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAR-18-2025, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ASHLEY FURNITURE INDUSTRIES
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,500.00 FILED BY JOHNSON, LAZANIUS AS TO DEFENDANT ASHLEY FURNITURE INDUSTRIES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-02-2025 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-02-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-02-2025 BY JUDGE ANDREW Y.S. CHENG. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF LAZANIUS JOHNSON IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ASHLEY FURNITURE INDUSTRIES (ANIS GHAMMASHI) IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOT REPORTED.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) ANIS GHAMMASHI FILED BY DEFENDANT ASHLEY FURNITURE INDUSTRIES
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-02-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JOHNSON, LAZANIUS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ASHLEY FURNITURE INDUSTRIES $3,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,550.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
